creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: 5.9.4 was giving me the same problem. I finally gave up in frustration, removed all ports on my system, and reinstalled everything. It compiled without any problem then. I can only speculate that perhaps there was some problem caused by the presence of the previous version or perhaps one its dependencies. But I guess it can be closed if I'm no longer having the problem and don't know how to reproduce it.
